extraction.method: Python standard-library HTMLParser over the server-rendered article element
extraction.scope: Full article body; scripts, styles, navigation, and site chrome excluded; link targets retained inline
verified_sections: Going from zero to one: a roadmap to great evals for agents
extraction.notes: The source HTML was inspected at the beginning, middle, and end after extraction. Prose, lists, code-like examples, acknowledgements, and appendix are present. Visual table layout is flattened to text, but its labels and cells are retained. This artifact is source evidence, not a deep review.
